info.name: Rotana Store API v1
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Rotana Store ERP platform.

Base URL: `{{baseUrl}}/api/v1`

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header.
Obtain tokens via `POST /auth/login` or `POST /auth/register`.

## Response Envelope
```json
// Success
{ "success": true, "data": { ... } }

// List with pagination
{ "success": true, "data": [...], "meta": { "page": 1, "limit": 20, "total": 100, "totalPages": 5 } }

// Error
{ "success": false, "error": { "code": "NOT_FOUND", "message": "..." } }
```

## Role Groups
| Group | Roles |
|---|---|
| ADMIN_ROLES | SUPER_ADMIN |
| MANAGER_ROLES | SUPER_ADMIN, WAREHOUSE_MANAGER, STORE_MANAGER |
| STAFF_ROLES | SUPER_ADMIN, WAREHOUSE_MANAGER, STORE_MANAGER, CASHIER, ACCOUNTANT |
| DELIVERY_ROLES | SUPER_ADMIN, WAREHOUSE_MANAGER, DELIVERY_DRIVER |

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication & session management. Public endpoints (login, register) do not require tokens.

request.description:
Register a new user. Returns user object + JWT tokens.

**Auth:** Public

**Roles for registration:** CUSTOMER (default), CASHIER, SALESMAN, DELIVERY_DRIVER

**Validation:**
- `name`: string, min 2 chars
- `email`: valid email, unique
- `password`: string, min 8 chars
- `phone`: string, min 10 chars (optional)
- `role`: enum (optional, defaults to CUSTOMER)

Authenticate with email/password. Returns user object + JWT access & refresh tokens.

Auto-saves tokens to collection variables via test script.

**Auth:** Public

**Validation:**
- `email`: valid email
- `password`: string, min 1 char

Rotate JWT tokens. Invalidates the old refresh token and issues new access + refresh tokens.

**Auth:** Public (uses refresh token in body)

**Validation:**
- `refreshToken`: string, min 1 char

Get the authenticated user's profile.

**Auth:** Bearer Token

**Returns:** id, name, email, phone, role, avatarUrl, isActive, createdAt

Logout by deleting all refresh tokens for the current user.

**Auth:** Bearer Token

query.description: Filter by role: SUPER_ADMIN | WAREHOUSE_MANAGER | STORE_MANAGER | CASHIER | SALESMAN | DELIVERY_DRIVER | ACCOUNTANT | CUSTOMER

request.description:
List all users. Optionally filter by role.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** ADMIN_ROLES (SUPER_ADMIN)

Update a user's profile, role, status, or password.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** ADMIN_ROLES (SUPER_ADMIN)

**Body (all optional):**
- `name`: string
- `phone`: string
- `role`: enum
- `isActive`: boolean
- `password`: string, min 8 chars (will be hashed)

Soft-delete a user by setting `isActive` to false.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** ADMIN_ROLES (SUPER_ADMIN)

item.name: Products
item.description: Product catalogue management. GET list/detail are public.

query.description: Search by name, brand, or tag

request.description:
List active products with variants. Paginated.

**Auth:** Public (no token required)

**Returns:** Paginated list with `meta` object.

Get a single product with its active variants and category.

**Auth:** Public

body.raw:
{
  "categoryId": "uuid-here",
  "name": "Basmati Rice",
  "description": "Premium aged basmati rice",
  "brand": "Daawat",
  "imageUrl": "https://example.com/rice.jpg",
  "images": [],
  "barcode": "8901234567890",
  "isPerishable": false,
  "tags": ["rice", "staples"],
  "variants": [
    {
      "sku": "RICE-BAS-1KG",
      "name": "1 Kg Pack",
      "unitValue": 1,
      "unitLabel": "kg",
      "costPrice": 80,
      "sellingPrice": 120,
      "mrp": 130,
      "taxRate": 5,
      "reorderLevel": 10
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Create a product with one or more variants.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES (SUPER_ADMIN, WAREHOUSE_MANAGER, STORE_MANAGER)

**Required:** categoryId, name, variants (min 1)
**Variant required:** sku, name, unitValue, unitLabel, costPrice, sellingPrice

Update product fields (partial update, no schema enforcement).

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

Soft-delete a product by setting status to DISCONTINUED.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

Create multiple products in a single request. Body is an array of product objects (same schema as single create).

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

List all active categories with their children.

**Auth:** Public

Create a new product category. Slug is auto-generated from name.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** name
**Optional:** description, imageUrl, parentId (UUID for subcategories)

query.description: PENDING | CONFIRMED | PROCESSING | READY | DISPATCHED | DELIVERED | CANCELLED | RETURNED

request.description:
List orders with filters and pagination. Role-scoped: SALESMAN sees only assigned orders, CUSTOMER sees only own orders.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Get full order details including items, customer, delivery, invoice, and ledger entries. Customers can only view their own orders.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Create a new order with inventory reservation.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

**Required:** orderType, items (min 1 with variantId + quantity)
**Optional:** customerId, paymentMethod (CASH|CARD|UPI|BANK_TRANSFER|CREDIT), sourceLocationId, destLocationId, deliveryAddressId, notes, discountAmount, deliveryCharge

Update order status, payment, or assignment. Triggers inventory fulfillment on DELIVERED and reservation release on CANCELLED. Auto-generates invoice and ledger entries on delivery.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

**Body (all optional):**
- `status`: OrderStatus enum
- `paymentStatus`: PENDING | PARTIAL | PAID | REFUNDED
- `paidAmount`: number
- `gatewayRef`: string
- `notes`: string
- `assignedToId`: UUID

query.description: ASSIGNED | PICKED_UP | IN_TRANSIT | DELIVERED | FAILED | RETURNED

request.description:
List deliveries. Drivers automatically see only their own deliveries.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** DELIVERY_ROLES

Create/assign a delivery for an order. One delivery per order.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** orderId (UUID)
**Optional:** driverId, estimatedAt (ISO datetime), routeOrder (integer)

Driver updates delivery status. On DELIVERED: triggers full fulfillment pipeline (order status, inventory release/fulfill, ledger posting, invoice generation).

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** DELIVERY_ROLES (drivers can only update their own)

**Required:** status (DeliveryStatus enum)
**Optional:** latitude, longitude, deliveryProof (URL), failureReason, notes

item.name: Inventory
item.description: Stock level queries and manual inventory events.

query.description: true = show only items at or below reorder level

request.description:
Query current inventory balances (onHand, reserved, available) enriched with variant and product info.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Manually apply an inventory event. Creates an immutable event record and updates the balance.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** variantId, locationId, eventType, quantity (positive int)
**Optional:** binId, referenceId, referenceType, notes

**Event Types:** STOCK_IN | STOCK_OUT | ADJUSTMENT | ORDER_RESERVED | ORDER_RELEASED | ORDER_FULFILLED | TRANSFER_IN | TRANSFER_OUT | DAMAGE_WRITE_OFF | RETURN_IN

List all active locations with their bins.

**Auth:** Public

**Optional filter:** type (LocationType enum)

Create a new location.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** name, type (LocationType), code
**Optional:** address, city

query.description: Search by name or contact name

request.description:
List active suppliers with optional search.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Create a new supplier.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** name
**Optional:** contactName, phone, email, address, city, gstNumber, panNumber, paymentTerms (default 30), creditLimit

List goods received notes with pagination.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Create a GRN and automatically stock in received items. Damaged items are written off. The GRN transitions from RECEIVED → STOCKED atomically.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** supplierId, locationId, items (min 1)
**Item required:** variantId, orderedQty, receivedQty, costPrice
**Item optional:** damagedQty (default 0), expiryDate, batchNumber

List all stock transfers with from/to locations and items.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Initiate a stock transfer between locations. Validates stock availability and deducts from source (TRANSFER_OUT).

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** fromLocationId, toLocationId (must differ), items (min 1)
**Optional:** notes

Receive a transfer at the destination. Records received quantities and adds to destination inventory (TRANSFER_IN). Marks transfer as COMPLETED.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

**Required:** items array with variantId + receivedQty

List all active ledger accounts ordered by code.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Create a non-system ledger account. Code must be unique.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** ADMIN_ROLES (SUPER_ADMIN)

**Required:** code, name, type (ASSET | LIABILITY | EQUITY | REVENUE | EXPENSE)
**Optional:** description

List ledger entries (double-entry journal) with pagination and date/type filters.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

List sales commissions with user and order details.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

List payslips with user details. Filter by employee, month, or year.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

Create or update a payslip. Supports single object or array for bulk creation. Net pay is auto-calculated: `basicSalary + allowances + commissions - deductions`. Upserts on (userId, month, year) composite key.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**Required:** userId, month (1-12), year, basicSalary
**Optional:** allowances (default 0), deductions (default 0), commissions (default 0), paidAt (ISO datetime or null)

Bulk create/update payslips. Same endpoint as single create — send an array instead of an object.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

Get individual payslip details with employee info.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

Update an existing payslip. Net pay is recalculated.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

**All fields optional:** basicSalary, allowances, deductions, commissions, paidAt

Permanently delete a payslip.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Business intelligence and BI chart data.

request.description:
Business intelligence summary: orders (today/month/pending), revenue (total/monthly/growth%), inventory alerts, delivery stats, and top 5 selling products.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

Full BI analytics suite for charting: P&L (revenue, COGS, salaries, margins), sales trends (30 days), category revenue distribution, stock per location, payroll history, and current stock value.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** STAFF_ROLES

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Performance analytics for employees and suppliers.

query.description: ISO date (defaults to first day of current month)

request.description:
Performance analytics for non-customer staff: orders handled, revenue generated, deliveries completed, commissions earned.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES

query.description: ISO date (defaults to first day of current month)

request.description:
Supplier performance analytics: total GRNs, invoices, spend, discrepancy rate, and reliability score.

**Auth:** Bearer Token
**Roles:** MANAGER_ROLES
